meta.name: Cluster co-occurrence
meta.description: How the chance of finding one region near another changes with distance (computed directly on the spot coordinates).
meta.provenance: Adapted from the squidpy 'Co-occurrence' vignette; targets the visium_hne example.

readme: Computes co-occurrence probability of `obs['cluster']` categories as a function of distance, directly on the spot coordinates (no spatial-neighbors graph needed), then plots the curve for one focal region.

params.name: cluster_key
params.tooltip: obs column holding the region/cluster labels

params.name: clusters
params.tooltip: focal region whose co-occurrence curve is plotted
